failure.message: TimeoutError: Session did not expire after 300s

skipped.message: MFA feature flag disabled in staging

testcase.name: test_place_order

failure.message: ConnectionError: Failed to connect to payment service at payments.internal:8081

testcase.failure: Traceback (most recent call last): File "tests/api/test_orders.py", line 66, in test_place_order payment = payment_client.charge(cart) File "app/clients/payment.py", line 34, in charge resp = requests.post("http://payments.internal:8081/charge", json=data, timeout=5) requests.exceptions.ConnectionError: Failed to connect to payments.internal:8081

error.message: OperationalError: could not connect to server: Connection refused at 127.0.0.1:5432

testcase.error: sqlalchemy.exc.OperationalError: (psycopg2.OperationalError) could not connect to server: Connection refused Is the server running on host "127.0.0.1" and accepting TCP/IP connections on port 5432?
